content.query:
--create external table on top of csv file

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE serverless_ext_table_data1
(
    airline_id VARCHAR(100),
    airline_name VARCHAR(100),
    country VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION='data1',
    DATA_SOURCE=serverless_ext_data_source_,
    FILE_FORMAT=serverless_ext_file_format_csv
)

SELECT * FROM serverless_ext_table_data1

--create external table on top of parquet file

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE serverless_ext_table_data2
(
    EmployeeID	INT,
    Name VARCHAR(100),
    Age	INT,
    Salary INT,
    Department	VARCHAR(100),
    HireDate VARCHAR(100),
    Skills VARCHAR(100)

)
WITH
(
    LOCATION='data2',
    DATA_SOURCE=serverless_ext_data_source_,
    FILE_FORMAT=serverless_ext_file_format_parquet
)

SELECT * FROM serverless_ext_table_data2
